mapper.insert: insert into batch.workflow_definition_version ( tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, workflow_code, version, workflow_name, workflow_type, enabled, nodes_json, edges_json, saved_by, saved_at, summary ) values ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.workflowDefinitionId}, #{p.workflowCode}, #{p.version}, #{p.workflowName}, #{p.workflowType}, #{p.enabled}, #{p.nodesJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.edgesJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{p.savedBy}, current_timestamp, #{p.summary} )
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, workflow_code, version, workflow_name, workflow_type, enabled, nodes_json::text as nodes_json, edges_json::text as edges_json, saved_by, saved_at, summary from batch.workflow_definition_version where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and workflow_definition_id = #{workflowDefinitionId} order by version desc, id desc
